description: Configure a new payment term in iDempiere to offer a discount for early payment. Create a Payment Term record with the Search Key '2-10-Net-45', Name '2% 10 Net 45', and Description '2% discount if paid within 10 days, net due in 45 days'. The term must be configured with a 2% discount, 10 discount days, and 45 net days. Ensure the record is validated and ready for use.
